name: Mcdonald's Breakfast Burritos
recipeIngredient: Jimmy Dear spicy Sausage, Patties, brown (crumbled): 1/2 pound
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbled sausage, scrambled eggs, and diced tomatoes.
2. Place about 1/6 of the mixture into the center of each tortilla.
3. Top each mound with 1 tablespoon of melted cheese Whiz.
4. Fold the bottom third of the tortilla up over the filling.
5. Bring the right side of the tortilla toward the left, folding it over the filling.
6. Fold the left side of the tortilla to the right, leaving the top end open.
7. Wrap each burrito in waxed paper and refrigerate for up to 4 hours.
8. Microwave each burrito briefly just before serving to warm them.
9. Serve with picante sauce on the side. Do not freeze.
